sys_remote_update_set.name: Catalog — Apple Vision Pro (clone of iPad pro)
sys_remote_update_set.description: Adds a new "Apple Vision Pro" catalog item to the Service Catalog under the same Hardware category as iPad pro, with Band size + Storage variables. Modeled on the existing iPad pro item (sys_id c3b9cbf29716cd1021983d1e6253afad).

sys_update_xml.name: sc_cat_item_deae0ebb09c38bb7a0a2681794779fc6
sys_update_xml.payload:
deae0ebb09c38bb7a0a2681794779fc6 Apple Vision Pro Apple Vision Pro Request for Apple Vision Pro Apple Vision Pro is a revolutionary spatial computer that blends digital content with your physical space, letting you navigate with your eyes, hands, and voice.

Key features:

  • Display: dual micro-OLED, 23 million pixels
  • Chips: Apple M2 + R1
  • Operating system: visionOS
  • Audio: Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking
  • Cameras: stereoscopic 3D capture for spatial photos and videos
]]> 3499 0 0 0 true false on_desktop restricted snc_internal e0d08b13c3330100c8b837659bba8fb4 d258b953c611227a0146101fb1be7c31 1970-01-03 00:00:00 item true true true true use_desktop_picture non_zero semi_automated 30f3d26187e92300e0ef0cf888cb0b91 global sc_cat_item sc_cat_item_deae0ebb09c38bb7a0a2681794779fc6

sys_update_xml.name: item_option_new_29cf0f776cba70dd9c1186e4f484b756
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update table="item_option_new"> <item_option_new action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>29cf0f776cba70dd9c1186e4f484b756</sys_id> <cat_item>deae0ebb09c38bb7a0a2681794779fc6</cat_item> <name>band_size</name> <sys_name>Choose the band size</sys_name> <question_text>Choose the band size</question_text> <type>3</type> <order>10</order> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <active>true</active> <read_only>false</read_only> <default_value>medium</default_value> <layout>normal</layout> <visibility>1</visibility> <do_not_select_first>false</do_not_select_first> <include_none>false</include_none> <visible_bundle>true</visible_bundle> <visible_guide>true</visible_guide> <visible_standalone>true</visible_standalone> <sys_scope>global</sys_scope> <sys_class_name>item_option_new</sys_class_name> <sys_update_name>item_option_new_29cf0f776cba70dd9c1186e4f484b756</sys_update_name> </item_option_new> </record_update>
